log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Minotaur — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Minotaur — Unarmored Caster. 7d8+30 necrotic.
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Minotaur — Unarmored Caster.
→ Minotaur — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 20] FAIL! 26 necrotic damage. HP: 41/67
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:19+9=28 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:4+9=13 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
--- Minotaur — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:17+9=26 vs DC 16] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Minotaur — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 27/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Lich (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
--- Minotaur — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 12/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (12/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Minotaur — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Minotaur — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 35 fire damage + .
